headline: Red Sox hammered in Toronto while Patriots overhaul the roster
morning_brew: The Sox got absolutely hammered in Toronto, losing 8-1. Brayan Bello could not even get through four innings, giving up four earned runs. That is a brutal outing when you need a spark and some consistency from the rotation. We are 12-19 and the season is slipping away fast. Alex Cora sent an email to the organization after his firing last Saturday, but words do not fix a sub-.400 winning percentage. This team needs a major jolt to get back to the nine titles we have in the trophy case.

The draft is where the future is built, and the Patriots were busy addressing a lot of holes. R1.28: Caleb Lomu, OT out of Utah. Drake Maye needed better protection all year. Love it, glaring need addressed. R2.55: Gabe Jacas, EDGE out of Illinois. The defense needs a boost on the outside. Head-scratcher, plenty of talent still on the board. R3.95: Eli Raridon, TE out of Notre Dame. We needed another target in the passing game. About time, filling an obvious gap. R5.171: Karon Prunty, CB out of Wake Forest, depth at corner. R6.196: Dametrious Crownover, OT out of Texas A&M, more protection for the pocket. R6.212: Namdi Obiazor, LB out of TCU, special teams or depth. R7.234: Behren Morton, QB out of Texas Tech, a developmental arm. R7.245: Jam Miller, RB out of Alabama, backfield depth. R7.247: Quintayvious Hutchins, EDGE out of Boston College, a local kid to round out the class.

The C's are heading to Philly tonight with a chance to move on. Jayson Tatum and the crew are 56-26 and need to show that championship grit that defines eighteen banners in the Garden. Meanwhile, the B's are in a massive hole. Buffalo is looking to clinch the series in the next one. After winning forty-five games this year, seeing them on the brink of elimination is tough. We have six Cups in our history, but that does not mean anything if you cannot finish a series. They need a huge effort to keep the dream of another parade through the Hub alive.

news_digest.headline: In email, thankful Alex Cora confident in Red Sox's future
news_digest.dans_take: It is nice to say goodbye, but we need to see some real results on the field at Fenway.

news_digest.headline: 2026 MLB ABS challenge system tracker: Team, player rankings
news_digest.dans_take: The robots are taking over the game, but maybe they can help the Sox get a call for once.

news_digest.headline: Patriots players support Vrabel, stay focused on football
news_digest.dans_take: The locker room is sticking by the coach while the noise keeps getting louder.
